overview: An Orzhov Standard deck built around gaining life when creatures enter the battlefield to grow key threats and control the board. It offers two upgrade paths: a Bats subtheme focused on flying synergies and scrying, or a pure Lifegain build emphasizing card advantage and aggressive pressure. The strategy aims to delay explosive turns and outlast opponents through steady resource generation.
win_conditions: Growing creatures like Amalia Benavides Aguirre and Essence Channeler through life gain triggers
Going wide with flying creatures and bats to apply pressure
Using Restless Fortress as an auxiliary win condition
Delaying explosive turns to outvalue opponents

keep_criteria: Hands with turn-one plays like Momo, Friendly Flier
Hands containing turn-two threats like Hinterland Sanctifier
Hands with early land drops and life gain triggers
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early creatures or lands
Hands heavy on high-cost payoffs without early triggers

examples.reason: Provides a turn-one play, turn-two threat, and early lands matching the deck's low mana curve.

early_game: Play Momo, Friendly Flier on turn one to reduce flying costs and enable early bats
Use Starting Town to pay life for Essence Channeler's ability
Establish early life gain triggers with Case of the Uneaten Feast
mid_game: Accumulate triggers with Hinterland Sanctifier and Zoraline, Cosmos Caller or Voice of Victory
Grow Amalia Benavides Aguirre and Essence Channeler with +1/+1 counters
Use interaction like Erode and Deep-Cavern Bat to clear board and hand
late_game: Leverage card advantage engines like Haliya, Guided by Light, Darkstar Augur, and Enduring Innocence
Activate Restless Fortress for additional life gain and pressure
Close out with large, triggered creatures and wide board presence

key_cards.name: Essence Channeler
key_cards.notes: Gains life when creatures enter, synergizes with Starting Town's life loss.

key_cards.name: Amalia Benavides Aguirre
key_cards.notes: Grows with life gain triggers and provides board control.

key_cards.name: Momo, Friendly Flier
key_cards.notes: Reduces flying costs, acts as a bat, and enables turn-one plays.

key_cards.name: Hinterland Sanctifier
key_cards.notes: Accumulates life gain triggers and becomes a 2/3 on turn two with Valley Questcaller.

key_cards.name: Erode
key_cards.notes: Best white removal in Standard, essential for clearing threats.

key_cards.name: Haliya, Guided by Light
key_cards.notes: Generates life gain triggers that guarantee extra draws.

key_cards.name: Restless Fortress
key_cards.notes: Provides life gain that can be offset with Scoured Barrens.

key_cards.name: Darkstar Augur
key_cards.notes: Ensures more resources as the game goes on, synergizes with Momo.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize playing Momo, Friendly Flier on turn one to unlock flying synergies
Use Starting Town's life loss to fuel Essence Channeler early
Offset life loss from Starting Town with Scoured Barrens later
Sequence Hinterland Sanctifier on turn two to maximize early triggers

matchups.advice: Use ETB life gain effects to delay their explosive turns and outvalue them in Best of One.

common_threats: Explosive early-game turns from aggressive decks

overview_evidence.evidence_span: runs a mix of effects to gain life when creatures enter the battlefield, creatures that grow with those triggers, and a bat subtheme

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: creatures that grow with those triggers
Restless Fortress as an auxiliary win condition
delay the opponent's most explosive turns

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: playing it on turn one helps with another issue
capable of providing the life loss bonus for Essence Channeler
life gain can be 'offset' with Scoured Barrens
turning it into a 2/3 on turn two

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: too many Rest in Peace and similar cards in sideboards today
